description_long: This fire hydrant features a robust cylindrical body painted in a weathered red, with a domed cap and side outlets finished in a contrasting teal color. The hydrant is adorned with graffiti and markings, giving it an urban, well-used appearance. Two prominent hose connection outlets extend from either side, each secured with metallic chains attached to the caps. The central front face displays a circular plate, likely for maintenance or operation, and the top is fitted with an operating nut for valve control. The base is wide and flanged, designed for secure mounting to the ground. The surface shows signs of wear, scratches, and grime, consistent with exposure to outdoor city environments.
description: A red and teal fire hydrant with graffiti, metallic chains on the side caps, and a domed top, showing signs of urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central circular plate, both side outlets with chains, and the domed teal cap.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the left outlet, chain, and graffiti details, with the operating nut visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hydrant, graffiti, and both side outlets with chains.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right outlet, chain, and additional graffiti, with the domed cap visible.
